issues.title: ZERO light/dark mode implementation
issues.description: No @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark), no dark mode tokens, no theme switcher component
issues.impact: WCAG 2.1 AA failure, healthcare compliance risk, v1.0 blocker

issues.title: Placeholder color palette - not production-ready
issues.description: Current colors (#007878 teal) are placeholder quality (5/10), lack professional brand identity
issues.impact: Undermines library maturity perception, blocks marketing/demos

issues.title: wc-container missing from Vite build config
issues.description: Component exists in src/components/ but not defined in entry points
issues.impact: Component unbuildable, inaccessible to consumers

issues.title: Missing changesets integration
issues.description: CLAUDE.md mandates changesets for version management but not installed or configured
issues.impact: Cannot manage versions/releases, blocks multi-dev workflow

issues.title: No conventional commit enforcement
issues.description: commitlint not configured despite documentation mandate
issues.impact: Inconsistent commit history, blocks automated changelog

issues.title: Component count documentation wrong
issues.description: CLAUDE.md says 3 components, actually 13 exist
issues.impact: Onboarding confusion, inaccurate system representation

issues.title: MISSING declaration files (.d.ts)
issues.description: Build configured for declaration:true but not generating .d.ts files, consumers get no type safety
issues.impact: TypeScript consumers cannot use library safely, blocks enterprise adoption

issues.title: Missing strict mode flags
issues.description: noUncheckedIndexedAccess and exactOptionalPropertyTypes not enabled in tsconfig
issues.impact: Potential runtime errors from unchecked array access

issues.title: Missing lifecycle super() calls
issues.description: Only 4/14 components call super.connectedCallback() and super.disconnectedCallback()
issues.impact: Potential memory leaks, broken inheritance chain if components are extended

issues.title: Missing @state decorators
issues.description: wc-card, wc-text-input, wc-textarea have reactive properties without @state decorator
issues.impact: Re-renders may not trigger correctly, state management bugs

issues.title: Missing @storybook/addon-essentials
issues.description: Manual addon management instead of using addon-essentials bundle
issues.impact: Missing standard tooling (viewport, backgrounds, measure, outline)

issues.title: NO CEM integration configured
issues.description: Custom Elements Manifest exists (5245 lines) but Storybook not configured to consume it for autodocs
issues.impact: Missing automatic API documentation from CEM

issues.title: No theme switching decorator
issues.description: Cannot preview dark mode or high-contrast themes in Storybook
issues.impact: Cannot validate theming without manual DOM manipulation

issues.title: Minimal interaction tests
issues.description: Only 1 story has play function for interaction testing
issues.impact: User workflows not validated in Storybook

issues.title: Function coverage gap
issues.description: 84.96% function coverage (target: 95%), missing reportValidity() tests across form components
issues.impact: Untested validation logic may fail in production

issues.title: No integration tests
issues.description: Zero multi-component workflow tests (e.g., form with inputs + button)
issues.impact: Component interaction bugs not caught

issues.title: No performance regression tests
issues.description: No render time, memory leak, or bundle size tests
issues.impact: Performance regressions undetected

issues.title: ZERO VRT baselines generated
issues.description: Visual regression test infrastructure exists, 0 screenshots captured (36 tests dormant)
issues.impact: Visual regressions undetected, UI bugs shipped to production

issues.title: Cross-browser testing not enabled
issues.description: Chromium only, no Firefox/WebKit in test matrix
issues.impact: Browser-specific bugs undetected

issues.title: Storybook interaction tests minimal
issues.description: Only 1 story with play function
issues.impact: User interaction workflows not validated

issues.title: wc-checkbox: Incorrect keyboard pattern
issues.description: tabindex="-1" breaks native keyboard interaction (WCAG 2.1.1 Level A)
issues.impact: Component unusable with keyboard, healthcare deployment blocked

issues.title: wc-radio: Missing ARIA attributes
issues.description: Incomplete role/focus implementation for radio groups
issues.impact: Screen readers cannot announce radio group state

issues.title: wc-badge: No semantic role for notifications
issues.description: Healthcare alerts not announced to assistive technology
issues.impact: Critical health notifications missed by screen reader users

issues.title: wc-card: Improper link role
issues.description: Using role="link" on div instead of semantic <a> element
issues.impact: Navigation patterns broken for AT users

issues.title: Focus visible implementation gaps
issues.description: Inconsistent :focus-visible styles across components
issues.impact: Keyboard users cannot track focus position

issues.title: Touch target size compliance
issues.description: wc-button sm variant is 32px (WCAG minimum: 44px)
issues.impact: Mobile users with motor impairments cannot activate

issues.title: No color contrast automation
issues.description: WCAG contrast ratios not programmatically verified
issues.impact: Theming changes may introduce contrast failures

issues.title: Generic error messages
issues.description: Form validation lacks specific healthcare context
issues.impact: Users don't understand how to fix errors

issues.title: No screen reader testing documented
issues.description: No NVDA, JAWS, or VoiceOver test procedures
issues.impact: AT compatibility unknown

issues.title: Minification DISABLED
issues.description: vite.config.ts has minify: false (30-40% size penalty)
issues.impact: All bundles 30-40% larger than necessary

issues.title: wc-form violates budget
issues.description: 6.3KB gzipped (budget: 5KB) due to 32KB embedded CSS
issues.impact: Exceeds performance budget, page load penalty

issues.title: Large CSS payloads in JS
issues.description: wc-form: 32KB CSS, wc-prose: 20KB scoped CSS embedded in JS bundles
issues.impact: Parse/eval overhead, larger bundle sizes

issues.title: Token inlining inefficient
issues.description: 11KB CSS string with all 200+ tokens in every component
issues.impact: Repeated token definitions across components

issues.title: No guard() or repeat() directives
issues.description: List rendering lacks efficient diffing (repeat directive)
issues.impact: Slower list updates, unnecessary DOM thrashing

issues.title: querySelector extensive
issues.description: 28 files use querySelector (potential layout thrashing)
issues.impact: Repeated DOM queries may cause performance issues

issues.title: NO deployment automation
issues.description: Manual deployment only, no staging/production environments configured
issues.impact: Cannot deploy safely, blocks multi-environment workflow

issues.title: Library not publishable
issues.description: package.json has "private": true, blocks npm publishing
issues.impact: Cannot distribute library to consumers

issues.title: Admin build FAILING
issues.description: ESLint errors blocking CI pipeline
issues.impact: Cannot deploy admin dashboard

issues.title: No Turborepo remote cache
issues.description: CI could be <5s with remote cache, currently 12.22s
issues.impact: Slow CI feedback loop

issues.title: No Chromatic integration
issues.description: No visual regression cloud service configured
issues.impact: VRT baselines not persisted, manual screenshot management

issues.title: No staging environment
issues.description: Production-only deployment, no pre-production validation
issues.impact: Cannot test releases before production

issues.title: NO actual Drupal integration artifacts
issues.description: Zero .twig files, libraries.yml, or PHP code despite being primary consumer
issues.impact: Cannot use in Drupal without writing everything from scratch

issues.title: CDN distribution not configured
issues.description: Documentation promises CDN delivery but no CDN setup exists
issues.impact: Cannot use via <script> tag as documented

issues.title: Missing LICENSE file
issues.description: No LICENSE file in repository root
issues.impact: Legal risk, cannot accept external contributions

issues.title: Broken onboarding docs
issues.description: ONBOARDING.md references non-existent remote scripts
issues.impact: New developers cannot follow setup instructions

issues.title: Missing CONTRIBUTING.md
issues.description: No contributor guidelines
issues.impact: Blocks PRs and external contributions

issues.title: Build failing - Admin app
issues.description: 3 ESLint errors in admin app blocking build
issues.impact: Cannot build or deploy admin dashboard

issues.title: No commitlint
issues.description: Documented in ONBOARDING.md but not enforced via Husky
issues.impact: Inconsistent commit messages, blocks conventional changelog

issues.title: Missing sideEffects declaration
issues.description: package.json missing sideEffects field for optimal tree-shaking
issues.impact: Suboptimal bundle sizes for consumers

issues.title: hx-card stories use 'wcHref' argType name (old wc- prefix)
issues.description: hx-card.stories.ts line 38 uses 'wcHref' as the argType key, violating the hx- prefix convention. Should be 'hxHref' or 'href'. The render function correctly maps to hx-href but the argType name exposes the old naming.
issues.impact: Naming inconsistency visible to consumers in Storybook controls panel

issues.title: hx-form stories reference --wc-* token prefix (should be --hx-*)
issues.description: hx-form.stories.ts line 975 contains text referencing '--wc-* variables' instead of '--hx-* variables'. Leftover from the wc-to-hx rename. Bug in documentation copy.
issues.impact: Incorrect token prefix in documentation confuses consumers

issues.title: hx-prose stories use void import suppression hack
issues.description: hx-prose.stories.ts uses 'void within; void userEvent; void fn;' to suppress unused variable warnings. No other story file uses this antipattern. Should either remove unused imports or use them in play functions.
issues.impact: Code smell, inconsistent pattern across story files

issues.title: hx-card stories use 'Appearance' argType category instead of 'Visual'
issues.description: hx-card.stories.ts uses table.category: 'Appearance' on lines 22 and 32 while all other files use 'Visual' for the same semantic purpose. Cross-file inconsistency in controls panel organization.
issues.impact: Inconsistent controls panel grouping across components

issues.title: hx-card module-level fn() spies without consistent cleanup
issues.description: hx-card.stories.ts creates fn() spies at module scope (lines 311, 810, 845, 878, 911) that accumulate call counts across HMR cycles. The Interactive story (line 341) does not call mockClear(). Should move fn() inside play functions or add cleanup to all play functions.
issues.impact: Flaky interaction tests during development with HMR

issues.title: Unused imports (within, userEvent, fn) in 8+ story files
issues.description: Multiple story files import within, userEvent, and fn from storybook/test but never use them. Affected files: hx-alert, hx-badge, hx-container, hx-prose, hx-radio, hx-select, hx-switch, hx-textarea. Will trigger lint warnings.
issues.impact: Lint warnings, dead code, inconsistent patterns

issues.title: Four different comment divider styles across story files
issues.description: Story files use four different section divider characters: ==== (alert, checkbox, form, prose), ──── (badge), ━━━━ (button, card, container, radio-group, radio, text-input, textarea), ────── (select). Should standardize on one style.
issues.impact: Visual inconsistency in code, developer confusion

issues.title: Incomplete argTypes in container, form, and prose stories
issues.description: hx-radio-group is the gold standard with all 5 argType categories (Properties, Events, Slots, CSS Custom Properties, CSS Parts). hx-container, hx-form, and hx-prose are missing Events, Slots, and/or CSS categories in their argTypes. These should be documented even if the component has none (to explicitly show 'none').
issues.impact: Autodocs API tables incomplete for 3 components

issues.title: Composition stories inconsistently use raw HTML vs hx-components
issues.description: Some InAForm stories use raw <button> instead of <hx-button> (hx-switch, hx-textarea). Some InACard stories use raw <div> instead of <hx-card> (hx-switch, hx-textarea). Should dogfood the component library in all composition stories.
issues.impact: Missed dogfooding opportunity, inconsistent patterns for consumers to copy

issues.title: hx-container uses 'Layout' argType category instead of 'Properties'
issues.description: hx-container.stories.ts uses table.category: 'Layout' for width and padding properties while other files use 'Properties'. Minor cross-file inconsistency.
issues.impact: Minor inconsistency in controls panel grouping

issues.title: Default value quoting inconsistency across story files
issues.description: Some files use { summary: '' } (bare strings) while others use { summary: "''" } (quoted strings showing type). Two camps: select/switch use bare, text-input/textarea use quoted. Should standardize.
issues.impact: Minor inconsistency in autodocs default value display

issues.title: hx-checkbox: Broken keyboard navigation (tabindex="-1")
issues.description: Native checkbox input has tabindex="-1", removing it from tab order entirely. WCAG 2.1.1 Keyboard (Level A) violation.
issues.impact: Checkbox completely unusable with keyboard. Healthcare deployment blocked.

issues.title: hx-card: Non-semantic link implementation (role="link" on div)
issues.description: Using role="link" on div instead of semantic <a> element. Breaks screen reader link navigation, browser link context menu, and expected link behaviors.
issues.impact: Screen readers cannot use "list all links" feature. Navigation patterns broken for AT users.

issues.title: hx-badge: Missing live region for notification badges
issues.description: Badge has no role or aria-live attributes when used for notifications (variant="error", variant="warning" with pulse). Healthcare alerts not announced.
issues.impact: Critical health notifications ("3 critical lab results") missed by screen reader users. Patient safety risk.

issues.title: hx-form: Missing form error summary announcement
issues.description: When validation fails, errors dispatched via event but no live region announces them to screen readers. WCAG 3.3.1 Error Identification (Level A).
issues.impact: Screen reader users not notified when form submission fails. May believe submission succeeded.

issues.title: hx-radio: Missing aria-labelledby
issues.description: Radio element has role="radio" and aria-checked but no aria-labelledby linking to label. Screen readers may not announce label when focused.
issues.impact: Radio label may not be announced by screen readers

issues.title: hx-container: Not a landmark, missing skip link support
issues.description: Container renders generic div with no landmark role option. Cannot create semantic page regions or skip repeated content blocks. WCAG 2.4.1 Bypass Blocks.
issues.impact: Screen reader users cannot navigate by landmark regions or skip repeated content

issues.title: hx-prose: No heading hierarchy guidance or validation
issues.description: Prose component has no mechanism to enforce or validate heading hierarchy (h1 → h2 → h3). CMS content may have broken heading hierarchy.
issues.impact: Broken heading hierarchy makes navigation difficult for screen reader users

issues.title: hx-select: Placeholder as first option not fully accessible
issues.description: Placeholder rendered as disabled option. Not read by all screen readers and not a true label. WCAG 3.3.2 Labels or Instructions.
issues.impact: Some screen readers skip disabled options, leaving select unlabeled

issues.title: Missing prefers-reduced-motion support across animated components
issues.description: No @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) queries in hx-badge (pulse), hx-switch (thumb transition), hx-card (hover). WCAG 2.3.3 Animation from Interactions (AAA, but healthcare best practice).
issues.impact: Users with vestibular disorders may experience nausea from animations

issues.title: hx-text-input: No autocomplete attribute support
issues.description: No autocomplete property exposed. WCAG 1.3.5 Identify Input Purpose (Level AA). Browser autofill does not work optimally.
issues.impact: Users with cognitive disabilities cannot benefit from autocomplete

issues.title: hx-textarea: Character counter not announced via aria-live
issues.description: Character counter updates on input but has no aria-live announcement. WCAG 4.1.3 Status Messages (Level AA).
issues.impact: Screen reader users not notified when approaching character limit

issues.title: reportValidity() not tested for hx-radio-group
issues.description: Lines 291-292 in hx-radio-group.ts (reportValidity method) are untested. Constraint validation UI triggering untested, may fail in production. Function coverage at 88% (target: 95%).
issues.impact: Constraint validation UI (reportValidity) untested, may fail when form validation triggered

issues.title: Slot change handlers not tested (4 components)
issues.description: Slot change handlers systematically untested: hx-checkbox (126-128), hx-text-input (139-148, 151-154), hx-textarea (162-165, 172-175), hx-select (147-149). Slotted content changes may not trigger proper re-renders or state updates.
issues.impact: Slotted label/error changes untested, internal state updates (_hasLabelSlot, _hasErrorSlot) may fail

issues.title: hx-textarea maxlength validation not tested
issues.description: Lines 222-226 in hx-textarea.ts (_updateValidity maxlength path) are untested. tooLong validity state untested, maxlength constraint validation may fail. Coverage: 90.82%, function coverage: 88.88% (target: 95%).
issues.impact: maxlength constraint validation untested, tooLong validity state may not be set correctly

issues.title: hx-form getNativeFormElements() button collection not tested
issues.description: Lines 161, 170-171 in hx-form.ts (getNativeFormElements button handling, _getAllValidatableElements) are untested. Forms with native <button> elements may not be discovered correctly. Coverage: 85.71%.
issues.impact: Native button elements in forms may not be collected by getNativeFormElements()

issues.title: hx-form validation error collection not tested
issues.description: Lines 193-194, 204-205 in hx-form.ts (_collectValidationErrors, _handleSubmit client-side path) are untested. Error collection on invalid submit may fail, wc-invalid event detail may be incorrect.
issues.impact: wc-invalid event may not contain detailed error list, error collection logic untested

issues.title: validationMessage getter not tested (hx-radio-group)
issues.description: Lines 276-277 in hx-radio-group.ts (validationMessage getter) are untested. Validation messages may not be accessible to consumers. Function coverage at 88% (target: 95%).
issues.impact: validationMessage property untested, consumers may not get expected validation messages

issues.title: VRT missing hover/focus states
issues.description: Visual regression tests only capture default states. Missing VRT baselines for hover, focus, and active states for all interactive components (button, card, input, select, etc.).
issues.impact: Visual regressions in interactive states (hover/focus/active) undetected

issues.title: hx-badge uncovered line 78
issues.description: Line 78 in hx-badge.ts is untested. Coverage 97.72%, branch coverage 77.77%. Requires code inspection to determine if public behavior.
issues.impact: Unknown (requires code inspection)

issues.title: hx-select uncovered lines 102, 244
issues.description: Lines 102 and 244 in hx-select.ts are untested. Coverage 96.19%, function coverage 88.23% (target: 95%). Internal helper logic untested.
issues.impact: Internal helper logic untested, may contain edge case bugs

issues.title: VRT missing for hx-container, hx-prose, hx-form
issues.description: Visual regression tests do not include hx-container, hx-prose, or hx-form components. Layout components lack VRT baselines.
issues.impact: Visual regressions in layout components undetected

issues.title: Lifecycle methods use Map<string, unknown> instead of PropertyValues<this>
issues.description: All updated() and firstUpdated() methods in 8 components use Map<string, unknown> for changed properties parameter instead of the type-safe PropertyValues<this> from Lit. Affected: hx-textarea, hx-switch, hx-text-input, hx-select, hx-checkbox, hx-radio-group, hx-radio, hx-prose.
issues.impact: Loss of type safety in lifecycle methods, cannot use changedProperties.get() with proper typing
issues.effort: 1 hour (add PropertyValues import and update 8 components)

issues.title: Missing exported event detail interface types
issues.description: Event detail types are inline in JSDoc (@fires {CustomEvent<{value: string}>}) but not exported as reusable interface types. Consumers cannot import these types for type-safe event handling with addEventListener. Best practice: export HxInputEventDetail, HxClickEventDetail, etc.
issues.impact: TypeScript consumers must manually reconstruct event detail types, no autocomplete for event.detail properties

issues.title: Missing event map interfaces for type-safe addEventListener
issues.description: No EventMap interfaces defined for components. Pattern should be: interface HxButtonEventMap { 'hx-click': CustomEvent<HxClickDetail>; }. This enables type-safe addEventListener('hx-click', (e) => {...}) with proper event.detail typing.
issues.impact: No IDE autocomplete for event names, no type checking for addEventListener event handlers
issues.effort: 3 hours (create event maps for all components with events)

issues.title: Using || instead of ?? for default values
issues.description: Multiple instances of || operator for defaults instead of nullish coalescing (??). Found in hx-textarea.ts line 218, 224, 333, 358, 363; hx-alert.ts line 72. || fails for falsy values (0, '', false) while ?? only fails for null/undefined.
issues.impact: Potential bugs with falsy but valid values (empty string, zero, false)

issues.title: Missing noImplicitReturns and noFallthroughCasesInSwitch flags
issues.description: tsconfig.base.json missing recommended strict flags per CLAUDE.md TypeScript Specialist role: noImplicitReturns (functions must explicitly return or throw) and noFallthroughCasesInSwitch (switch cases must break/return).
issues.impact: Potential logic errors from implicit undefined returns or unintended fallthrough
issues.effort: 2 hours (enable flags and fix any resulting errors)

issues.title: Admin app missing strict type flags
issues.description: apps/admin/tsconfig.json does not extend tsconfig.base.json strict settings. Missing noUncheckedIndexedAccess and exactOptionalPropertyTypes. Only has basic strict: true.
issues.impact: Admin app has lower type safety than library, potential runtime errors

issues.title: Missing branded types for component tag names and CSS properties
issues.description: No branded types for type-safe string literals per TypeScript Specialist role. Should have: type ComponentTagName = `hx-${string}`, type CSSCustomProperty = `--hx-${string}`, type CSSPart = string & { readonly __brand: 'CSSPart' }.
issues.impact: Missing type safety for string literal patterns, harder to catch typos in tag names and CSS properties
issues.effort: 3 hours (create branded types and refactor usages)

issues.title: hx-form violates 5KB budget (6.10KB gzipped)
issues.description: 32KB scoped CSS file (form.scoped.css) embedded in JS bundle causes component to exceed performance budget by 22%
issues.impact: Page load penalty, exceeds performance budget (5KB → 6.10KB gzipped), blocks v1.0 release
issues.effort: 8-12 hours (CSS optimization - split critical vs. non-critical styles)

issues.title: No CDN build configured
issues.description: Vite config only generates ESM format, no IIFE/UMD bundle for <script> tag usage despite documentation promising CDN delivery
issues.impact: Cannot use via <script> tag as documented, blocks Drupal SSR usage, no single-file distribution
issues.effort: 4 hours (add CDN build target to Vite config)

issues.title: Package.json main/module point to source instead of dist
issues.description: main, module, and types fields point to ./src/index.ts instead of ./dist/index.js, breaking npm consumption
issues.impact: npm consumers cannot use library without TypeScript compilation, blocks external adoption

issues.title: No bundle size budget enforcement in CI
issues.description: No size-limit or bundlesize tooling configured, bundle size regressions go undetected
issues.impact: Size regressions go undetected until manual review, no automated budget enforcement
issues.effort: 3 hours (configure size-limit, add to CI pipeline)

issues.title: Zero GPU-accelerated animations
issues.description: No will-change or transform: translateZ(0) in CSS, all animations run on main thread
issues.impact: Janky animations on low-end devices, 60fps not guaranteed for transitions
issues.effort: 6 hours (audit all transitions, add GPU hints to critical animations)

issues.title: No Lighthouse CI for Core Web Vitals
issues.description: No Lighthouse integration in GitHub Actions, LCP/FID/CLS metrics not measured
issues.impact: LCP/FID/CLS not measured, performance regressions invisible, no Core Web Vitals tracking
issues.effort: 4 hours (configure Lighthouse CI, set performance budgets)

issues.title: No lazy loading documentation
issues.description: No examples of IntersectionObserver-based component loading, consumers load all components upfront
issues.impact: Consumers load all components upfront leading to large page bundles, missed optimization opportunity
issues.effort: 2 hours (write docs + example code for lazy loading pattern)

issues.title: hx-radio-group uses querySelectorAll in _syncRadios()
issues.description: this.querySelectorAll('hx-radio') called on every update instead of caching radio list
issues.impact: Minor performance hit on radio group property updates, unnecessary DOM queries
issues.effort: 30 minutes (cache radio list, update on slotchange)

issues.title: Package exports point to source files instead of build artifacts
issues.description: @helix/library package.json has main/module/types/exports pointing to ./src/*.ts but files array only includes dist/. When published, consumers get 404s.
issues.impact: Library completely unusable when published to npm. All imports will 404. Blocks any external consumption.

issues.title: Node.js version mismatch between package.json and CI/local
issues.description: package.json specifies Node >=20.0.0 but local is Node 24.11.1. CI tests 18/20/22. Package manager is npm@10.8.2 but local is npm@11.6.2.
issues.impact: CI may pass but local builds fail. Package manager mismatch causes lock file conflicts.

issues.title: No Turborepo remote caching configured
issues.description: turbo.json has no remoteCache. CI shows Remote caching disabled. Wastes 12-15s per CI run.
issues.impact: Slow CI feedback loop. Remote cache could reduce CI from 15s to <5s (70% improvement).

issues.title: No root-level TypeScript configuration for monorepo-wide type checking
issues.description: tsconfig.base.json exists but no root tsconfig.json with project references to all packages.
issues.impact: Cannot run single tsc --build command to type-check entire monorepo incrementally.

issues.title: Storybook has no tsconfig.json
issues.description: apps/storybook/ has no tsconfig.json, relying on inherited Vite defaults.
issues.impact: IDE may not provide proper TypeScript IntelliSense in Storybook.

issues.title: Build warnings not treated as errors in CI
issues.description: Astro shows TypeScript warnings (unused imports, deprecated APIs) but CI passes.
issues.impact: Code quality degrades. Warnings accumulate without forcing fixes.

issues.title: No dependency update automation (Dependabot/Renovate)
issues.description: No .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json. Dependencies manually updated across 8 packages.
issues.impact: Security vulnerabilities and outdated dependencies accumulate.

issues.title: Vitest workspace config includes Storybook but tests run separately
issues.description: vitest.workspace.ts includes apps/storybook/vitest.config.ts but Storybook uses @storybook/addon-vitest
issues.impact: Confusing test setup. npm run test may not run Storybook tests as expected.

issues.title: Turborepo globalDependencies incomplete
issues.description: turbo.json globalDependencies only includes .env files, missing shared config like tsconfig.base.json, eslint.config.js
issues.impact: Cache may not invalidate when shared config changes. Could cause stale builds.

issues.title: Turborepo cache directory large (254MB)
issues.description: .turbo/cache/ is 254MB with 630 artifacts. No cache size limit configured.
issues.impact: Disk space usage. Could grow unbounded over time.
